description: Shareable Renovate preset for Manolii ecosystem consumers — extend with 'github>Manolii-org/ai-starter-pack'. Digest/pin rotations automerge on green CI (they carry no semver surface); every semver update stays a manually-reviewed PR. A consumer's own packageRules override these on conflict.

customManagers.description: Track AI Starter Pack source pins.

packageRules.description: Automerge pure pin/digest rotations (action digests, docker digests, pin-dependencies) — no semver surface, reviewable content is nil. platformAutomerge stays OFF: in a consumer repo with no required status checks GitHub's native queue would merge before CI runs, whereas Renovate-managed automerge waits for branch tests to pass and (ignoreTests=false default) refuses to automerge when a repo has no tests at all. Everything semver-versioned still requires human review.
Never automerge anything with a version component.
Preserve pack-bump triage metadata without changing the semver manual-review policy.
